features: Fruit-Powered Skincare Routine: Quiyum 5-in-1 set includes Yuzu Cleanser, Citrus Vitamin C Toner, Watermelon Niacinamide Serum, Avocado Eye Cream, and Blueberry Moisturiser—all infused with fruit extracts and skin-loving ingredients to hydrate, balance, and energise skin day and night

Gentle & Nourishing Ingredients: Formulated with yuzu extract, AHA/BHA, vitamin C, niacinamide, hyaluronic acid, ceramides, and avocado oil to exfoliate, refine pores, boost hydration, and enhance elasticity for a smooth, radiant complexion

Suitable for All Skin Types: Perfect for dry, oily, combination, and sensitive skin, this lightweight formula absorbs quickly, balancing oil and moisture without clogging pores. It addresses dryness, dullness, and pore congestion

Ideal for Everyday & Special Occasions: Perfect for morning and night routines or self-care sessions, providing a complete skincare experience. The cleanser purifies, toner balances, serum nourishes, eye cream smooths fine lines, and moisturiser offers hydration. Travel-friendly and convenient

Perfect Gift Set for Glass Skin: Beautifully packaged for a spa-like experience, Quiyum fruit skincare kit makes an ideal gift for birthdays, holidays, Mother’s Day, or self-care rituals—perfect for those seeking radiant, youthful skin

product_details_tab_data.Safety Warning: For external use only. Keep out of reach of children. Do not swallow. Avoid contact with eyes. Discontinue use if signs of irritation or rash occur. Store in a cool and dry place.
